title: Huh 8x
description: Huh 8x is an 8 by 8 pixel Minecraft 1.8.9 PvP texture pack for bedwars and duels that will boost your fps.
body: Huh 8x is a Minecraft 1.8.9 PvP texture pack for bedwars and duels. The resolution of most parts of the pack is 8 by 8 pixels. I have textured most things you will need to PvP in 1.8.9 Minecraft. Use Huh 8x to boost your fps.
